name: Lighted Full Length Mirror with Tech Integration - Room Essentials™
description:
Add an elegant and functional touch to your space with the Lighted Full-Length Mirror with Tech Integration from Room Essentials™. This rectangular mirror features a framed design with a back-lit mirror to help you check your reflection. Designed with an aluminum frame in a glossy finish, this full-length mirror can be used over the door, mounted on the wall mount or kept freestanding.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
